meaning: 科茨沃尔德丘陵地带[英国西南部](曾是羊毛主要产地)
examples: She married a lord and lives in this huge house in the Cotswolds.
It loves the Cotswolds and hates Wales.
In the eastern part of the Cotswolds lies Oxford.
The article 'Eat your way around the Cotswolds' was published in partnership with Lonely Planet.
The Bateleur eagles escaped from their handlers at events in the Cotswolds, Exmoor and Sussex last August.
